parameters.content:
## 🌙 Nightly Self-QA — the fleet tests itself
On a schedule, this workflow sends one real chat turn to **every** agent's webhook, checks each answered without an error, and builds a pass/fail digest. Catch a broken agent before a customer does.

### ⚙️ How it works
1. **Schedule** fires (default 02:00 daily)
2. **Build probe list** — one `{name,url,prompt}` per agent (internal `n8n:5678` webhooks)
3. **HTTP Request** hits each (continue-on-fail)
4. **Score** → Markdown digest (`report_markdown`)

Wire the digest to Slack/email to get a nightly report. Runs manually too — click **Test workflow**.

parameters.jsCode:
const probes = [{"name": "CP CPinfo Analysis — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/f68c312c-1ad1-4d8b-b7c1-a5ced2248f23/chat", "prompt": "What cpinfo bundles are available?"}, {"name": "CP Documentation — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/6457b028-9b78-42c9-b3a7-2e43073c468e/chat", "prompt": "Find the SK about the Gaia API"}, {"name": "CP Fleet Commander — Estate Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/0e5e1455-3148-5047-88ab-d999b6002eb3/chat", "prompt": "Which gateways are in my estate?"}, {"name": "CP HTTPS Inspection — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/df6e86fa-f71a-4dce-bf1f-86b8b8a01a49/chat", "prompt": "Show the HTTPS inspection rules"}, {"name": "CP Logs — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/35bcabf8-caf6-4033-b66d-4658abbaa057/chat", "prompt": "Show the last 10 dropped connections"}, {"name": "CP Gaia OS — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/414009d6-7ae2-471c-9f11-f3590bc2e024/chat", "prompt": "Show the interfaces and their IPs"}, {"name": "CP Gateway CLI — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/7b1a963d-5338-4954-97bf-77f18643fdc3/chat", "prompt": "Show the cluster status"}, {"name": "CP Quantum Management — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/799f12a9-0a0c-40e2-9302-799f2c23a881/chat", "prompt": "List the gateways and their IPs"}, {"name": "CP Reputation — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/d9e1213c-ea8c-4482-aa48-36dffdb2e837/chat", "prompt": "What's the reputation of 1.2.3.4?"}, {"name": "CP Threat Emulation — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/dac0e01a-cbec-41fd-8de0-c9fa951c1369/chat", "prompt": "What file types can you emulate?"}, {"name": "CP Threat Prevention — AI Agent", "url": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/f9c04e85-08a8-405c-9835-5426c9b01420/chat", "prompt": "List the Threat Prevention profiles"}];
return probes.map(p => ({ json: p }));
